name: HWR_VLTR_GOAL_VL
query: SELECT A.GOAL_ID GOAL_ID, A.LOWER_BOUND LOWER_BOUND, A.UPPER_BOUND UPPER_BOUND, A.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE EFFECTIVE_START_DATE, A.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE EFFECTIVE_END_DATE, A.CREATED_BY CREATED_BY, A.CREATION_DATE CREATION_DATE, A.LAST_UPDATED_BY LAST_UPDATED_BY, A.LAST_UPDATE_DATE LAST_UPDATE_DATE, A.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, B.GOAL_METRIC GOAL_METRIC, B.UNITS UNITS, B.FREQUENCY FREQUENCY , A.HCM_PERSON_ID HCM_PERSON_ID FROM HWR_VLTR_GOAL_B A, HWR_VLTR_GOAL_TL B WHERE A.GOAL_ID = B.GOAL_ID AND B.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
